title: Natal, RN — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Natal, RN: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Natal is a city in RN with a population of 896,708. The ‘City of Sun’ with year-round warm weather, famous for its dunes, Genipabu beaches, and the massive Fortaleza dos Reis Magos.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
